description: A new project requires a new access role to be created that combines permissions from multiple applications. An IAM analyst must design and create the role.

nodes.task_description: Work with the business unit to define the specific, minimum-necessary permissions the new role requires.

expected_outcome.value: Analyst gathers a precise list of required permissions.

nodes.task_description: Design a new role in the Identity Governance tool that aggregates the required permissions.

expected_outcome.value: Analyst successfully designs the new role.

nodes.task_description: Submit the new role for approval from the data owners of the affected applications before making it available for assignment.

expected_outcome.value: Analyst follows the governance process to get the new role approved.
